title: Barachias #0914
definition:
Barachiah = "Jehovah blesses"

 1) said to be the father of the Zachariah slain in the temple
nasbUsage:
Definition: Barachiah = "Jehovah blesses"

 1) said to be the father of the Zachariah slain in the temple

    NASB:  Barachiah, the father of a man killed in the temple:
